mapper.insert: insert into release_artifact (release_plan_id, artifact_name, version, artifact_type, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_hash, file_url, download_url, download_count, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, metadata) values (#{releasePlanId}, #{artifactName}, #{version}, #{artifactType}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{fileUrl}, #{downloadUrl}, #{downloadCount}, #{uploadedBy}, now(), #{metadata})
mapper.update: update release_artifact set deleted = 1 where release_artifact_id = #{releaseArtifactId}
mapper.select: select ra.release_artifact_id, ra.release_plan_id, ra.artifact_name, ra.version, ra.artifact_type, ra.file_name, ra.file_path, ra.file_size, ra.file_hash, ra.file_url, ra.download_url, ra.download_count, ra.uploaded_by, ra.uploaded_at, ra.metadata, ra.deleted, rp.name as release_name, su.user_name as uploaded_by_name from release_artifact ra left join release_plan rp on ra.release_plan_id = rp.release_plan_id and rp.deleted = 0 left join sys_user su on ra.uploaded_by = su.user_id and su.del_flag = '0' where ra.deleted = 0 and ra.release_plan_id = #{releasePlanId} order by ra.uploaded_at desc
select count(*) from release_artifact where release_plan_id = #{releasePlanId} and deleted = 0
